memoryArtifacts.headline: Life Sketch of Henderick Brass
memoryArtifacts.description: Henderick Pieterszen Brass was born about 1615 in Gelderland, the Netherlands and died on the 7th of April 1692, forty-four years after the 30 years war; at the time he was born, three years …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Henderick Pieterszen Brass於1615年4月7日出生在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德時，他的父親Pietersen 'Abraham' Van Deursen40歲，母親Margaretha Maria Janz16歲。他於1640年之前與Geertjen Everts結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1692年4月7日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼劍橋大學默里 約克 庫迪紐約市享年77歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼金斯福萊特藍茲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henderick Pieterszen Brass于1615年4月7日出生在荷兰蓋爾德藍德时，他的父亲Pietersen 'Abraham' Van Deursen40岁，母亲Margaretha Maria Janz16岁。他于1640年之前与Geertjen Everts结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1692年4月7日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼劍橋大學默里 約克 庫迪紐約市享年77岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼金斯福萊特藍茲。

nameMeanings.name: Brass
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Birse in Aberdeenshire, metathesized to Brass.
North German: nickname from Middle Low German brās ‘noise, pomp’, a related form of brāsch (see Braasch ).

variants.name: Brace
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French braz, brace, brase ‘arm’, probably used of someone with a strong arm or with a deformity of the arm.

nameMeanings.name: Henderick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: variant of   Hendricks  . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is 114.

History: Gerret Hendericks was one of the founders in 1683 of Germantown, PA, the earliest German-speaking settlement in North America, inhabited by immigrants from Germany, the Netherlands, and Switzerland.

variants.name: Hendricks
meanings: Dutch and North German: patronymic from the personal name   Hendrick  . See also   Hendriks  .

historicEvents.description: Curacao became a colony of the Netherlands.
End of Eighty Years' War with Spain.
After the English took over in the 1660s, the colony was renamed New York, after the Duke of York
Historical Boundaries 1683: Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Kings, New York, United States
Historical Boundaries 1683: New York County, New York Colony, British Colonial America 1776: New York, New York, United States

en.lifeSummary: When Henderick Pieterszen Brass was born on 7 April 1615, in Gelderland, Netherlands, his father, Pietersen 'Abraham' Van Deursen, was 40 and his mother, Margaretha Maria Janz, was 16. He married Geertjen Everts before 1640. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 7 April 1692, in New York City, New York County, New York Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 77, and was buried in Flatlands, Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henderick Pieterszen Brass est né le 7 avril 1615, à Gueldre, Pays-Bas, son père, Pietersen 'Abraham' Van Deursen, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Margaretha Maria Janz, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Geertjen Everts avant 1640. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 7 avril 1692, à New York City, New York County, New York Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Flatlands, Kings, New York Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henderick Pieterszen Brass am 7. April 1615 in Geldern, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Pietersen 'Abraham' Van Deursen 40 und seine Mutter Margaretha Maria Janz 16. Er hat vor 1640 Geertjen Everts geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 11 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 7. April 1692 im Alter von 77 Jahren in New York City, New York County, New York Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Flatlands, Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henderick Pieterszen Brass è nato il il 7 aprile 1615 nel Gelderland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Pietersen 'Abraham' Van Deursen, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Margaretha Maria Janz, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Geertjen Everts prima del 1640. Erano genitori di almeno 11 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 7 aprile 1692, nel New York City, New York County, New York Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Flatlands, Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Henderick Pieterszen Brassが1615年4月7日にオランダジェルダーランドで生まれた時，父Pietersen 'Abraham' Van Deursenは40歳，母Margaretha Maria Janzは16歳であった。1640年以前にGeertjen Evertsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1692年4月7日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヨーク コロニーニュー ヨーク コウントイニュー ヨーク シトイで77歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヨーク コロニーキングズフラトランズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henderick Pieterszen Brass(이)가 1615년 4월 7일 네덜란드 글델랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Pietersen 'Abraham' Van Deursen(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaretha Maria Janz(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1640년 이전 Geertjen Everts(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1692년 4월 7일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 뉴 요르크 카운티 뉴 요르크 시티에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 킨그스 플라틀랜드즈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henderick Pieterszen Brass nasceu em 7 de abril de 1615, em Gheldria, Países Baixos, seu pai, Pietersen 'Abraham' Van Deursen, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Margaretha Maria Janz, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Geertjen Everts antes 1640. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 7 de abril de 1692, em New York City, New York County, New York Colony, British Colonial America, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Flatlands, Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henderick Pieterszen Brass родился 7 апреля 1615 г. в местности джелдирланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Pietersen 'Abraham' Van Deursen было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaretha Maria Janz, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Geertjen Everts перед 1640 г. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 7 апреля 1692 г. в местности ню ерк сити, ню ерк коунти, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности флатландс, кингс, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henderick Pieterszen Brass nació el 7 de abril de 1615, en Gelderland, Países Bajos, su papá, Pietersen 'Abraham' Van Deursen, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Margaretha Maria Janz, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Geertjen Everts antes de 1640. Fueron padres de por lo menos 11 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 7 de abril de 1692, en New York City, New York County, New York Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Flatlands, Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America.
